basic_details.job_title: DEOC Mayurbhanj Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Launch Driver and Khalasi Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Emergency Operation Centre Mayurbhanj (DEOC Mayurbhanj)
basic_details.short_information: District Emergency Operation Centre Mayurbhanj (DEOC Mayurbhanj) Launch Driver and Khalasi Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website mayurbhanj.odisha.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DEOC Mayurbhanj Launch Driver and Khalasi Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 2nd Class Launch Driving Certificate, Crew Training completion certificate
qualification.details: Launch Driver: Minimum 2nd Class Launch Driving Certificate issued by the proper authority. Khalasi: Crew Training completion certificate from a Crew Training Institute.

selection_process: Document Verification Technical Test Swimming Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DEOC Mayurbhanj Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://mayurbhanj.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Launch Driver and Khalasi posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced by DEOC Mayurbhanj for the posts of Launch Driver and Khalasi. Out of these, 3 vacancies are for Launch Driver and 2 for Khalasi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Khalasi post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Khalasi post, candidates must possess a Crew Training completion certificate from a recognized Crew Training Institute. This is a mandatory requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Launch Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Launch Driver post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 13,900/-. This is a contractual position, and the salary is as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment includes Document Verification, a Technical Test, and a Swimming Test. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the validity period of the engagement?
faq.answer: The engagement for the recruited candidates will be valid till 30th November 2026. This is a contractual appointment, and the duration of employment is specified.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DEOC Mayurbhanj, which is https://mayurbhanj.odisha.gov.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for the DEOC Mayurbhanj recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date was 29th May 2026, and the last date for application submission is 10th June 2026. Document verification and tests are scheduled for 11th June 2026.
